abilities.name: Shock Coil
abilities.effect: Device. Persists 3 turns. Deals Storm damage to a random enemy at the start of each turn. Damage scales with Lira's Magic stat.
abilities.description: Deploy a coil that zaps a random enemy each turn.

abilities.name: Bulkhead
abilities.effect: Device. Persists 3 turns. Reduces physical damage to one chosen ally by 40%. Can stack with Edren's Ironwall.
abilities.description: Deploy a barrier device that absorbs physical damage for an ally.

abilities.name: Arc Trap
abilities.effect: Device. Hidden trap placed on the field. When an enemy uses a physical attack, the trap triggers, dealing Flame damage and inflicting a 20% Speed debuff for 2 turns. Single use.
abilities.description: Plant a hidden trap that punishes physical attackers.

abilities.name: Mending Engine
abilities.effect: Device. Persists 4 turns. Heals the most-injured ally for 15% max HP at the end of each turn.
abilities.description: Deploy a healing device that automatically mends the most injured ally.

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.effect: Instant. Lira supercharges one ally's next attack, adding Storm element and +50% damage. If the target already has an elemental weapon, the attack gains dual-element: it hits with BOTH elements, checking the target's weakness to each independently and using the more favorable result. Consumed on next attack.
abilities.description: Supercharge an ally's next attack with Storm energy.

abilities.name: Salvage
abilities.effect: Instant. Destroys one active device, recovering half its AC cost (rounded down).
abilities.description: Dismantle a deployed device to recover Arcanite Charges.

abilities.name: Thornveil Barrier
abilities.effect: Device. Persists 3 turns. Creates an Arcanite thorn barrier dealing counter-damage equal to 15% of the shielded ally's Defense to attackers. Counts toward 2-device limit.
abilities.description: Deploy a spirit-infused thorn barrier that damages attackers.

abilities.name: Arcanite Colossus
abilities.effect: Device. Persists 2 turns. A towering Forgewright construct that acts as an additional party member with its own ATB gauge. HP equal to 50% of Lira's max HP, Attack equal to Lira's Attack x 1.5, ATB speed equal to 75% of Lira's Speed. Cannot be healed but can be targeted by enemies. Attacks for physical damage equal to its Attack stat or can be commanded to shield an ally (absorb one hit, then destroyed).
abilities.description: Summon a massive Arcanite construct to fight alongside the party.

abilities.name: Cael's Edge
abilities.effect: Lira manifests Cael's Edge — a weapon forged from her connection to Cael. Shatters Vaelith's Pallor barrier (prerequisite for the Vaelith fight). Permanent weapon: ATK 72, Spirit element. Also grants Sever Bond (1 use, Vaelith fight only): a 3.0x ability multiplier physical attack with Spirit element that ignores Vaelith's DEF entirely. After the Vaelith fight, Cael's Edge remains as permanent equipment but Sever Bond is consumed.
abilities.description: Forge a Spirit-element weapon from the bond with Cael.

abilities.name: Calibrate
abilities.effect: Pallor-zone action. Targets one active device, removes malfunction chance for remaining duration. Available only in Pallor-corrupted zones.
abilities.description: Recalibrate a device to prevent Pallor-induced malfunctions.
